trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI at 56.9 — ideal bullish momentum zone with significant room before overbought territory — all three momentum signals firing (MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20), and lowest relative overextension among top-score candidates.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted higher in a quiet session — S&P 500 up 0.4% and NASDAQ barely positive at 0.1%, signaling cautious optimism but no strong directional conviction. Portfolio continues to perform at +1.8% overall, with GOOGL and AMD both showing strong momentum near or approaching profit targets. With cash just below the $500 threshold, I made one targeted buy in YSS — the top-scored candidate with the most runway before becoming overbought, deploying idle capital into a technically clean setup.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities closed slightly positive on April 30 as end-of-month rebalancing flows provided mild support to the S&P 500 (+0.4%), while technology stocks lagged with the NASDAQ barely budging (+0.1%). Investors remained cautious amid ongoing uncertainty around trade policy and the Federal Reserve's rate outlook, with many rotating into defensive and value-oriented names. The neutral tape reflected a market digesting recent gains rather than committing to a new directional move.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股4月30日小幅收高，月末再平衡資金流入支撐標普500指數上漲0.4%，惟科技股表現落後，納指僅微升0.1%。在貿易政策前景及聯準會利率走向仍存不確定性的背景下，投資者態度審慎，部分資金轉向防禦性及價值型股票。整體市場呈中性整固格局，反映投資者在消化近期升幅後暫取觀望態度，未有明確方向性部署。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI (Relative Strength Index) measures how fast and how far a stock has moved recently on a scale of 0–100. A reading between 55–70 is considered the 'bullish momentum zone' — the stock has positive momentum but isn't yet overbought, meaning it has room to keep climbing without an imminent reversal. Stocks above 70 are 'overbought' and more likely to pull back, which is why YSS (RSI 56.9) was preferred over higher-RSI candidates like GOOGL (81.1).
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: RSI（相對強弱指數）衡量股價近期漲跌幅度及速度，數值介於0至100之間。當RSI處於55至70區間，被視為「牛市動能區」——股價具備上升動力，但尚未超買，仍有繼續上行的空間而無即時回調風險。一旦RSI超過70，即進入「超買」狀態，回調風險上升。正因如此，RSI為56.9的YSS比RSI高達81.1的GOOGL更具吸引力，後者雖強勢但上行空間已趨收窄。
